userAutoOptIn,\n    });\n\n    const policy: OptInFeaturePolicy = \"permissive\";\n\n    const { enabled: effectiveEnabled, reason: effectiveReason } = computeEffectiveStateAcrossTeams({\n      globalEnabled,\n      orgState: effectiveOrgState,\n      teamStates: effectiveTeamStates,\n      userState: effectiveUserState,\n      policy,\n    });\n\n    return {\n      featureId,\n      globalEnabled,\n      orgState,\n      teamStates,\n      userState,\n      effectiveEnabled,\n      effectiveReason,\n      orgAutoOptIn,\n      teamAutoOptIns,\n      userAutoOptIn,\n    };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * List all opt-in features with their states for a user across teams.\n   * Only returns features that are in the allowlist, globally enabled, and scoped to \"user\".\n   */\n  async listFeaturesForUser(input: {\n    userId: number;\n    orgId: number | null;\n    teamIds: number[];\n  }): Promise<ListFeaturesForUserResult[]> {\n    const { userId, orgId, teamIds } = input;\n    const userScopedFeatures = getOptInFeaturesForScope(\"user\");\n    const featureIds = userScopedFeatures.map((config) => config.slug);\n\n    const resolvedStates = await this.resolveFeatureStatesAcrossTeams({\n      userId,\n      orgId,\n      teamIds,\n      featureIds,\n    });\n\n    return featureIds.map((featureId) => resolvedStates[featureId]).filter((state) => !state.globalEnabled);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * List all opt-in features with their raw states for a team or organization.\n   * Used for team/org admin settings page to configure feature opt-in.\n   * Only returns features that are in the allowlist, globally enabled, and scoped to the specified scope.\n   * If parentOrgId is provided, also returns the organization state for each feature.\n   */\n  async listFeaturesForTeam(input: {\n    teamId: number;\n    parentOrgId?: number | null;\n    scope?: OptInFeatureScope;\n  }): Promise<ListFeaturesForTeamResult[]> {\n    const { teamId, parentOrgId, scope = \"team\" } = input;\n    const teamIdsToQuery = getTeamIdsToQuery(teamId, parentOrgId);\n    const scopedFeatures = getOptInFeaturesForScope(scope);\n\n    const [allFeatures, teamStates] = await Promise.all([\n      this.featuresRepository.getAllFeatures(),\n      this.featuresRepository.getTeamsFeatureStates({\n        teamIds: teamIdsToQuery,\n        featureIds: scopedFeatures.map((config) => config.slug),\n      }),\n    ]);\n\n    const results = scopedFeatures.map((config) => {\n      const globalFeature = allFeatures.find((f) => f.slug === config.slug);\n      const globalEnabled = globalFeature?.enabled ?? false;\n      const teamState = teamStates[config.slug]?.[teamId] ?? \"inherit\";\n      const orgState = getOrgStateForTeam(parentOrgId, teamStates, config.slug);\n\n      return { featureId: config.slug, globalEnabled, teamState, orgState };\n    });\n\n    return results.filter((result) => result.globalEnabled);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Set user's feature state.\n   * Delegates to FeaturesRepository.setUserFeatureState.\n   * Throws an error if the feature is not scoped to \"user\".\n   */\n  async setUserFeatureState(\n    input:\n      | { userId: number; featureId: FeatureId; state: \"enabled\" | \"disabled\"; assignedBy: number }\n      | { userId: number; featureId: FeatureId; state: \"inherit\" }\n  ): Promise<void> {\n    const { userId, featureId, state } = input;\n\n    if (!isFeatureAllowedForScope(featureId, \"user\")) {\n      throw new ErrorWithCode(\n        ErrorCode.BadRequest,\n        `Feature \"${featureId}\" is not available at the user scope`\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (state === \"inherit\") {\n      await this.featuresRepository.setUserFeatureState({ userId, featureId, state });\n    } else {\n      const { assignedBy } = input;\n      await this.featuresRepository.setUserFeatureState({\n        userId,\n        featureId,\n        state,\n        assignedBy: `user-${assignedBy}`,\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Set team's feature state.\n   * Delegates to FeaturesRepository.setTeamFeatureState.\n   * Throws an error if the feature is not scoped to the specified scope.\n   */\n  async setTeamFeatureState(\n    input:\n      | { teamId: number; featureId: FeatureId; state: \"enabled\" | \"disabled\"; assignedBy: number; scope?: OptInFeatureScope }\n      | { teamId: number; featureId: FeatureId; state: \"inherit\"; scope?: OptInFeatureScope }\n  ): Promise<void> {\n    const { teamId, featureId, state } = input;\n    const scope = input.scope ?? \"team\";\n\n    if (!isFeatureAllowedForScope(featureId, scope)) {\n      throw new ErrorWithCode(\n        ErrorCode.BadRequest,\n        `Feature \"${featureId}\" is not available at the ${scope} scope`\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (state === \"inherit\") {\n      await this.featuresRepository.setTeamFeatureState({ teamId, featureId, state });\n    } else {\n      const { assignedBy } = input;\n      await this.featuresRepository.setTeamFeatureState({\n        teamId,\n        featureId,\n        state,\n        assignedBy: `user-${assignedBy}`,\n      });\n    }\n  }\n}\n","numLines":308,"startLine":1,"totalLines":308}}}

= [\n  // Example - to be populated with actual features\n  // {\n  //   slug: \"bookings-v3\",\n  //   titleI18nKey: \"bookings_v3_title\",\n  //   descriptionI18nKey: \"bookings_v3_description\",\n available for the org scope */\nexport const HAS_ORG_OPT_IN_FEATURES: boolean = OPT_IN_FEATURES.some((f) => !f.scope || f.scope.includes(\"org\"));\n\n/**\n * Get opt-in features that are available for a specific scope.\n * Features without a scope field are available for all scopes.\n */\nexport function getOptInFeaturesForScope(scope: OptInFeatureScope): OptInFeatureConfig[] {\n  return Features not in the config are NOT allowed (must be explicitly configured).\n */\nexport function isFeatureAllowedForScope(slug: string, scope: OptInFeatureScope): boolean {\n  const config = type { ZodEnum } from \"zod\";\nimport { z } from \"zod\";\n\nimport { getFeatureOptInService } from \"@calcom/features/di/containers/FeatureOptInService\";\nimport { TeamRepository } from \"@calcom/features/ee/teams/repositories/TeamRepository\";\nimport { isOptInFeature } from \"@calcom/features/feature-opt-in/config\";\nimport { FeaturesRepository } from \"@calcom/features/flags/features.repository\";\nimport { MembershipRepository } from \"@calcom/features/membership/repositories/MembershipRepository\";\nimport { prisma } from \"@calcom/prisma\";\n\nimport { TRPCError } from \"@trpc/server\";\n\nimport authedProcedure from \"../../../procedures/authedProcedure\";\nimport { router } from \"../../../trpc\";\nimport { createOrgPbacProcedure, createTeamPbacProcedure } from \"../../../procedures/pbacProcedures\";\n\nconst featureStateSchema: ZodEnum<[\"enabled\", \"disabled\", \"inherit\"]> = z.enum([\"enabled\", \"disabled\", \"inherit\"]);\n\nconst featureOptInService = getFeatureOptInService();\nconst featuresRepository = new FeaturesRepository(prisma);\nconst teamRepository = new TeamRepository(prisma);\n\n/**\n * Helper to get user's org and team IDs from their memberships.\n * Returns orgId (if user belongs to an org) and teamIds (non-org teams).\n */\nasync function getUserOrgAndTeamIds(userId: number): Promise<{ orgId: number | null; teamIds: number[] }> {\n  const memberships = await MembershipRepository.findAllByUserId({\n    userId,\n    filters: { accepted: true },\n  });\n\n  let orgId: number | null = null;\n  const teamIds: number[] = [];\n\n  for (const membership of memberships) {\n    if (membership.team.isOrganization) {\n      orgId = membership.teamId;\n    } else {\n      teamIds.push(membership.teamId);\n    }\n  }\n\n  return { orgId, teamIds };\n}\n\nexport const featureOptInRouter = router({\n  /**\n   * Get all opt-in features with states for current user.\n   * This considers all teams/orgs the user belongs to.\n   */\n  listForUser: authedProcedure.query(async ({ ctx }) => {\n    const { orgId, teamIds } = await getUserOrgAndTeamIds(ctx.user.id);\n\n    return featureOptInService.listFeaturesForUser({\n      userId: ctx.user.id,\n      orgId,\n      teamIds,\n    });\n  }),\n\n  /**\n   * Get all opt-in features with states for a team settings page.\n   * Used by team admins to configure feature opt-in for their team.\n   * Also returns the organization state if the team belongs to an organization.\n   */\n  listForTeam: createTeamPbacProcedure(\"featureOptIn.read\").query(async ({ input }) => {\n    // Get the team's parent organization ID (if any)\n    const parentOrg = await teamRepository.findParentOrganizationByTeamId(input.teamId);\n    const parentOrgId = parentOrg?.id ?? null;\n\n    return featureOptInService.listFeaturesForTeam({ teamId: input.teamId, parentOrgId, scope: \"team\" });\n  }),\n\n  /**\n   * Get all opt-in features with states for organization settings page.\n   * Used by org admins to configure feature opt-in for their organization.\n   */\n  listForOrganization: createOrgPbacProcedure(\"featureOptIn.read\").query(async ({ ctx }) => {\n    // Organizations use the same listFeaturesForTeam since they're stored in TeamFeatures\n    // Pass scope: \"org\" to filter features that are scoped to organizations\n    return featureOptInService.listFeaturesForTeam({ teamId: ctx.organizationId, scope: \"org\" });\n  }),\n\n  /**\n   * Set user's feature state.\n   */\n  setUserState: authedProcedure\n    .input(\n      z.object({\n        slug: z.string(),\n        state: featureStateSchema,\n      })\n    )\n    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {\n      await featureOptInService.setUserFeatureState({\n        userId: ctx.user.id,\n        featureId: input.slug,\n        state: input.state,\n        assignedBy: ctx.user.id,\n      });\n\n      return { success: true };\n    }),\n\n  /**\n   * Set team's feature state (requires team admin).\n   */\n  setTeamState: createTeamPbacProcedure(\"featureOptIn.update\")\n    .input(\n      z.object({\n        slug: z.string(),\n        state: featureStateSchema,\n      })\n    )\n    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {\n      if (!isOptInFeature(input.slug)) {\n        throw new TRPCError({\n          code: \"BAD_REQUEST\",\n          message: \"Invalid slug. This feature is not opt-in configurable.\",\n        });\n      }\n\n      // Organizations use the same TeamFeatures table\n      await featureOptInService.setTeamFeatureState({\n        teamId: ctx.organizationId,\n        featureId: input.slug,\n        state: input.state,\n        assignedBy: ctx.user.id,\n        scope: \"org\",\n      });\n\n      return { success: true };\n    }),\n\n  /**\n   * Get user's auto opt-in preference.\n   */\n  getUserAutoOptIn: authedProcedure.query(async ({ ctx }) => {\n    const autoOptIn = await featuresRepository.getUserAutoOptIn(ctx.user.id);\n    return { autoOptIn };\n  }),\n\n  /**\n   * Set user's auto opt-in preference.\n   */\n  setUserAutoOptIn: authedProcedure\n    .input(\n      z.object({\n        autoOptIn: z.boolean(),\n      })\n    )\n    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {\n      await featuresRepository.setUserAutoOptIn(ctx.user.id, input.autoOptIn);\n      return { success: true };\n    }),\n\n  /**\n   * Get team's auto opt-in preference (requires team admin).\n   */\n  getTeamAutoOptIn: createTeamPbacProcedure(\"featureOptIn.read\").query(async ({ input }) => {\n    const result = await featuresRepository.getTeamsAutoOptIn([input.teamId]);\n    return { autoOptIn: result[input.teamId] ?? false };\n  }),\n\n  /**\n   * Set team's auto opt-in preference (requires team admin).\n   */\n  setTeamAutoOptIn: createTeamPbacProcedure(\"featureOptIn.update\")\n    .input(\n      z.object({\n        autoOptIn: z.boolean(),\n      })\n    )\n    .mutation(async ({ input }) => {\n      await featuresRepository.setTeamAutoOptIn(input.teamId, input.autoOptIn);\n      return { success: true };\n    }),\n\n  /**\n   * Get organization's auto opt-in preference (requires org admin).\n   */\n  getOrganizationAutoOptIn: createOrgPbacProcedure(\"featureOptIn.read\").query(async ({ ctx }) => {\n    const result = await featuresRepository.getTeamsAutoOptIn([ctx.organizationId]);\n    return { autoOptIn: result[ctx.organizationId] ?? Each feature in the config defines its own policy (permissive or strict), but this code unconditionally uses 'permissive' for all features, violating the configuration system and causing incorrect feature resolution logic.\",\n    \"fix_patch\": \"--- a/packages/features/feature-opt-in/services/FeatureOptInService.ts\\n+++ b/packages/features/feature-opt-in/services/FeatureOptInService.ts\\n@@ -159,7 +159,8 @@ export class FeatureOptInService implements IFeatureOptInService {\\n       userAutoOptIn,\\n     });\\n \\n-    const policy: OptInFeaturePolicy = \\\"permissive\\\";\\n+    const featureConfig = getOptInFeatureConfig(featureId);\\n+    const policy: OptInFeaturePolicy = featureConfig?.policy ?? \\\"permissive\\\";\\n \\n     const { enabled: effectiveEnabled, reason: effectiveReason } = computeEffectiveStateAcrossTeams({\\n       globalEnabled,\\n\"\n  },\n  {\n    \"file\": \"packages/features/feature-opt-in/config.ts\",\n    \"line\": 76,\n    \"severity\": \"critical\",\n    \"description\": \"Missing null check for optional scope field. When a feature has no scope specified (which per the docstring should mean 'allowed for all scopes'), this causes a runtime error: 'Cannot read property includes of undefined'. The logic contradicts the documented behavior that features without scope are allowed for all scopes.\",\n    \"fix_patch\": \"--- a/packages/features/feature-opt-in/config.ts\\n+++ b/packages/features/feature-opt-in/config.ts\\n@@ -73,5 +73,5 @@ export const HAS_ORG_OPT_IN_FEATURES: boolean = OPT_IN_FEATURES.some((f) => !f.\\n export function isFeatureAllowedForScope(slug: string, scope: OptInFeatureScope): boolean {\\n   const config = getOptInFeatureConfig(slug);\\n   if (!config) return false;\\n-  return config.scope.includes(scope);\\n+  return !config.scope || config.scope.includes(scope);\\n }\\n\"\n  },\n  {\n    \"file\": \"packages/trpc/server/routers/viewer/featureOptIn/_router.ts\",\n    \"line\": 96,\n    \"severity\": \"high\",\n    \"description\": \"Union type violation in setUserState mutation. The code unconditionally passes 'assignedBy' when calling setUserFeatureState, but the service method defines a discriminated union where the 'inherit' state variant does NOT accept assignedBy. This violates the union type contract. When state is 'inherit', the object should not include assignedBy.\",\n    \"fix_patch\": \"--- a/packages/trpc/server/routers/viewer/featureOptIn/_router.ts\\n+++ b/packages/trpc/server/routers/viewer/featureOptIn/_router.ts\\n@@ -95,11 +95,16 @@ export const featureOptInRouter = router({\\n     })\\n     .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {\\n-      await featureOptInService.setUserFeatureState({\\n-        userId: ctx.user.id,\\n-        featureId: input.slug,\\n-        state: input.state,\\n-        assignedBy: ctx.user.id,\\n+      if (input.state === \\\"inherit\\\") {\\n+        await featureOptInService.setUserFeatureState({\\n+          userId: ctx.user.id,\\n+          featureId: input.slug,\\n+          state: \\\"inherit\\\",\\n+        });\\n+      } else {\\n+        await featureOptInService.setUserFeatureState({\\n+          userId: ctx.user.id,\\n+          featureId: input.slug,\\n+          state: input.state,\\n+          assignedBy: ctx.user.id,\\n+        });\\n+      }\\n \\n       return { success: true };\\n     }),\\n\"\n  },\n  {\n    \"file\": \"packages/trpc/server/routers/viewer/featureOptIn/_router.ts\",\n    \"line\": 124,\n    \"severity\": \"high\",\n    \"description\": \"Union type violation in setTeamState mutation. {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01FWoovNuCMJaBniHYYj5jEH","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Perfect! Here's a summary of the **6 defects** found:\n\n## Critical Defects (3)\n\n1. **Inverted Filter in `listFeaturesForUser` (FeatureOptInService.ts:205)**\n   - The filter returns features where `globalEnabled` is **false**, but documentation says it should return globally **enabled** features\n   - Severity: CRITICAL - directly contradicts documented behavior\n\n2. **Hardcoded Policy Ignores Configuration (FeatureOptInService.ts:161)**\n   - All features get policy \"permissive\" regardless of their individual config\n   - The system defines per-feature policies that are completely ignored\n   - Severity: CRITICAL - compliance violation; configuration system is bypassed\n\n3. **Missing Null Check for Optional Scope (config.ts:76)**\n   - Crashes with \"Cannot read property includes of undefined\" when feature has no scope specified\n   - Per documentation, features without scope should be allowed for all scopes\n   - Severity: CRITICAL - runtime crash when using unscoped features\n\n## High-Severity Defects (3)\n\n4-6. **Union Type Violations in Router Mutations (_router.ts:96, 124, 154)**\n   - All three mutations (`setUserState`, `setTeamState`, `setOrganizationState`) unconditionally pass `assignedBy`\n   - Service methods define discriminated unions where \"inherit\" state should NOT include `assignedBy`\n   - Severity: HIGH - violates type contracts; invokes incorrect union members\n\n**The review report has been written to `/workspace/review.json`** with all defects, severity levels, descriptions, and unified diff patches ready for application."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":12,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2704,"cache_read_input_tokens":40000,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":2704},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"dcd6fa2b-d93b-49a9-b6cb-d17b8d943f0f","uuid":"1fb71b83-f6f7-4620-ae77-e11568a739e1"}
